\documentclass[11pt,letterpaper]{article}

% Fonts and encoding
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}

% Geometry - Harvard style uses tight margins
\usepackage[top=0.5in, bottom=0.5in, left=0.5in, right=0.5in]{geometry}

% Colors and links
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue
}

% Typography
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}

% No page numbers
\pagestyle{empty}

% Remove paragraph indentation
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{6pt}

% Disable section numbering (removes 0.3.1, 0.3.2, etc.)
\setcounter{secnumdepth}{0}

% Section formatting - centered Harvard style with underline
\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\large\filcenter}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
  [\vspace{-6pt}{\centering\color{black}\titlerule[0.4pt]}\vspace{2pt}]

% Subsection formatting - left-aligned, no numbering
\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{8pt}{4pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{6pt}{2pt}

% List formatting - compact bullets
\setlist[itemize]{
  leftmargin=1.5em,
  itemsep=2pt,
  parsep=0pt,
  topsep=3pt,
  partopsep=0pt
}

% Pandoc tightlist command for compact lists
\providecommand{\tightlist}{%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}

\begin{document}

% Name and contact - centered Harvard style
$if(name)$
\begin{center}
  {\LARGE \textbf{$name$}} \\[4pt]
  $if(contact)$
  $contact$
  $endif$
\end{center}
\vspace{8pt}
$endif$

$body$

\end{document}
